indistinguishable_name.description: The specific name that the consenting LLC permits another entity to use under 31 MRSA §1508.4. The 'indistinguishable' qualifier means the name differs from the consenting LLC's name only by characters that do not produce a legally distinguishable name on SOS records.

name.description: Name of the entity (the 'requestor') receiving the right to use the indistinguishable name. Sub-keyed under requestor in case future versions of the form add requestor address or jurisdiction.

replacement_name.description: New (distinguishable) name the consenting entity commits to adopting. The form requires the consenting LLC to undertake a rename so the requestor's use of the indistinguishable name no longer creates a SOS-record conflict. Synth copies this into the bundled name-change form (e.g., MLLC-9 amendment.new_name) at fill time.

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Indexed Shape-D signer (1..2) for forms providing multiple parallel authorized-signer slots. Extends `filing.signer.printed_name_and_capacity` (single-signer Shape D) to forms like MLLC-15 that present two parallel slots. The first slot is required; subsequent slots are optional. Distinct from the per-officer pattern (`incorporator_N.*`) which is for formation filings whose entity does not yet exist.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
